title: Dropping Leaves
description: A mod which makes leaves drop instead of vanish!
body:
# Dropping Leaves [Github](https://github.com/LevAlTru/dropping-leaves) | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/dropping-leaves) ## What does it do? It makes the leaves drop (or fall) instead of fading in the air.
It's fully server side.
Also adds "droppingLeaves$shouldLeavesFall" gamerule if you want to turn off the mod without restarting the server.
## Q&A
Does it work with other mods? It should, but if it does not, you can always report it on Github
Will it be available for other modloaders and versions? I am lazy to port for the other modloaders, but i do want to port it to newer version eventually.
